variants: Celia Ursu enjoys active participation in the Willowwood Archivists, where her passion for Earth System Science is clearly evident. She engages in research projects that explore environmental systems supported by the Cypress Field Grant. Under the mentorship of Aymeric Lemoine, her doctoral advisor, Celia has refined her expertise and understanding of ecological dynamics. Furthermore, she holds an Underworld Florist Certification, integrating creativity into her scientific endeavors. This unique combination of skills enriches her contributions both in academic circles and in her community.
